<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused — one logical change each. -->

## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New block type / feature
- [ ] Docs / reference
- [ ] Cross-platform support (non-macOS equivalents, font paths)
- [ ] Other

## Verification
- [ ] Ran the render-and-look loop (`demo_poster.py` → `render_preview.py`) and
      checked the PNG for overflow / clipping / balance
- [ ] Tested with a long paragraph and/or CJK text (if layout/measuring changed)
- [ ] No real author/venue content was hard-coded into the engine

## Screenshots
<!-- Before / after PNG for any visual change. -->

## Notes for reviewers
<!-- Anything platform-specific, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
